---
title: Perf fixture
---

# Body

This paragraph describes a routine reading of the experiment. The cohort
matured at fourteen days, and the conversion window closed without
incident. The recommendation engine routed traffic through the standard
gates, and the rollout schedule held. See the relevant concept page for
deeper context.
